traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.description: Choose a lineage that grants supernatural abilities and spells at levels 1, 3, and 5. Spells are always prepared; each can be cast once without a spell slot (regained on Long Rest) and using any spell slots you have. Spellcasting ability: INT, WIS, or CHA (chosen at lineage selection).

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed condition.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Insight, Perception, or Survival skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: You don't need to sleep, and magic can't put you to sleep. You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in trancelike meditation, during which you retain consciousness.
